author: kraju
orig: przez napływ botów od ruskich i chinczyków  warstwa którą zapewnia steam nie wyrabia :v i się system wywalił trzeba czekać aż steam coś z tym zrobi
en: due to the influx of bots from Russians and Chinese, the layer provided by steam does not work :v and the system crashes, you have to wait until steam does something about it
pt: devido ao influxo de bots de russos e chineses, a camada fornecida pelo Steam não funciona :v e o sistema trava, você tem que esperar até que o Steam faça algo a respeito
label: xenophobic

context.author: amazingblatman
context.orig: ja sprzedawałem póki jeszcze alchemię miałem
context.en: I sold it while I still had alchemy
context.pt: Eu vendi enquanto ainda tinha alquimia

context.author: d3_stro
context.en: I mean, on the steam market?
context.pt: Quero dizer, no mercado de vapor?

context.author: greendragon2285
context.orig: synteze rób z alhemią jest jakis problem i nie daje cos siana mają to naprawic dzis jak zrestartujesz gre to ci sie zablokuje po aktualizajci sama aż nie naprawią XD
context.en: synthesis, do alhemia, there is some problem and it doesn't work, they are going to fix it today, when you restart the game, it will block itself after the update until they fix it XD
context.pt: síntese, faça alhemia, tem algum problema e não funciona, eles vão consertar hoje, quando você reiniciar o jogo, ele vai bloquear sozinho após a atualização até consertarem XD
context.label: clean

context.author: greendragon2285
context.orig: ja na rynku sprzedawałam głownie klucze do bosa i materiały te klejnoty miały dobre ceny
context.en: I mainly sold bosa keys on the market and these jewelery materials were at good prices
context.pt: Vendi principalmente chaves bosa no mercado e esses materiais de joalheria estavam com bons preços
context.label: clean
